title: Common Quantum Channels: Noise Models in Practice
description: Master the most important quantum noise channels - depolarizing, amplitude damping, and phase damping - understanding their physical origins and mathematical descriptions.
learningObjectives: Implement and analyze the depolarizing channel
Understand amplitude damping as T1 relaxation
Model dephasing with the phase damping channel
Compute channel effects on Bloch sphere
Combine multiple noise sources in realistic models
Connect noise parameters to physical decoherence times
